zh.Began, Michaelstone-y-Vedw, Monmouthshir: 威爾士蒙姆爾米可艾爾斯同--維德福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwilym William de Cameis Camoys Kemeys於大約1385年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾米可艾爾斯同--維德福時，他的父親John Kemeys26歲，母親Joan verch Ieuan24歲。他與Gwenllian Elizabeth Sibil Delahue de la Bere結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1447年被列為mayor of newport。他去世於1463年之後在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾紐波特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwilym William de Cameis Camoys Kemeys于大约1385年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾米可艾爾斯同--維德福时，他的父亲John Kemeys26岁，母亲Joan verch Ieuan24岁。他与Gwenllian Elizabeth Sibil Delahue de la Bere结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1447年被列为mayor of newport。他去世于1463年之后在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾紐波特。

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: William

meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Cameis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic: probably an altered form of Italian   Campise  .

variants.name: Campise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Gasper, Rocco, Gino, Sal, Salvatore.
Italian: nickname for a country dweller, from a derivative of   Campo  .

en.lifeSummary: When Gwilym William de Cameis Camoys Kemeys was born about 1385, in Michaelstone-y-Vedw, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, John Kemeys, was 26 and his mother, Joan verch Ieuan, was 24. He married Gwenllian Elizabeth Sibil Delahue de la Bere. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. In 1447, at the age of 63, his occupation is listed as mayor of newport. He died after 1463, in Newport, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Newport, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Ki: Newport, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwilym William de Cameis Camoys Kemeys est né environ 1385, à Michaelstone-y-Vedw, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, John Kemeys, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan verch Ieuan, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian Elizabeth Sibil Delahue de la Bere. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. En 1447, à l’âge de 63 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est mayor of newport. Il est décédé après 1463, à Newport, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwilym William de Cameis Camoys Kemeys um 1385 in Michaelstone-y-Vedw, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Kemeys 26 und seine Mutter Joan verch Ieuan 24. Er hat Gwenllian Elizabeth Sibil Delahue de la Bere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1447, als er 63 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als mayor of newport aufgeführt. Er starb nach 1463 in Newport, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwilym William de Cameis Camoys Kemeys è nato il circa 1385 nel Michaelstone-y-Vedw, Monmouthshire, Galles, il suo padre, John Kemeys, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan verch Ieuan, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian Elizabeth Sibil Delahue de la Bere. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1447, all'età di 63 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come mayor of newport. Morì dopo il 1463, nel Newport, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwilym William de Cameis Camoys Kemeysが約1385年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアミチャエルストーネ-イ-ベドウで生まれた時，父John Kemeysは26歳，母Joan verch Ieuanは24歳であった。Gwenllian Elizabeth Sibil Delahue de la Bereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1447年，63歳の時，職業はmayor of newportと記録されている。彼は1463年以後にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアニュープオルトで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwilym William de Cameis Camoys Kemeys(이)가 대략 1385년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 믹하얼스톤-이-브드w에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Kemeys(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan verch Ieuan(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Gwenllian Elizabeth Sibil Delahue de la Bere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1447년, 63세의 나이로 그의 직업은 mayor of newport이었다. 그는 1463년 이후 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 뉴포트에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwilym William de Cameis Camoys Kemeys nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Michaelstone-y-Vedw, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, John Kemeys, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan verch Ieuan, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian Elizabeth Sibil Delahue de la Bere. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1447, com 63 anos, sua profissão aparece como mayor of newport. Ele faleceu após 1463, em Newport, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwilym William de Cameis Camoys Kemeys родился около 1385 г. в местности мачаелстоуне-и-ведв, монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени John Kemeys было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan verch Ieuan, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian Elizabeth Sibil Delahue de la Bere. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1447 году, в возрасте 63 лет,  он работал по профессии mayor of newport. Он умер после 1463 г. в местности нюпорт, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

sm.Abt 1385–Aft 1463: e tusa o le 1385–ina ua ma'ea le 1463

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwilym William de Cameis Camoys Kemeys nació aproximadamente 1385, en Michaelstone-y-Vedw, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, John Kemeys, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan verch Ieuan, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Gwenllian Elizabeth Sibil Delahue de la Bere. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1447, a la edad de 63 años, su ocupación registrada era mayor of newport. Murió después de 1463, en Newport, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
